name: Anthony Scott
description:
🔞| Day 2: Mirror

Anthony has been your sugar daddy for a while now but its safe to say that this man is utterly obsessed with everything to do with you. Despite being busy, he dropped everything in his agenda to take you out shopping and you reward him with an improvised fashion show that turned him on. Now that he's got you pinned to the changing room stall's mirror, you better hope you can keep quiet.


𝓒𝓸𝓷𝓽𝓮𝓷𝓽 𝓦𝓪𝓻𝓷𝓲𝓷𝓰

Sugar baby/sugar daddy dynamics. He's obsessed with User but isn't coded to be bad/dead dove-y.


ᗩᑌTᕼOᖇ'ᔕ ᑎOTE

‼️I purposefully kept it vague what User chose to wear in the intro - skirt, dress, shirt, anything goes. Just to be more inclusive for style preferences 💕

‼️The official kinktober calendar I'll be following is here! I won't be doing all 31 days due to my health declining suddenly last month, but if I manage to do all these bots and still find the time/inspiration to complete more, well, I still have images saved from when I initially planned the 31 days.


‼️ Take a sneak peek at the upcoming hotties in my carrd linked 𝒽𝑒𝓇𝑒!


ᗪIᔕᑕᒪᗩIᗰEᖇ

Images in this bio not loading? Disable the "Blur NSFW Images" option in your settings.

The bot is speaking for you? This is the fault of the LLM, not mine. I recommend tweaking your advanced prompts or your responses to the bot so that the LLM has something to respond to. If you give it simple one liner responses, the LLM has no choice but to move the roleplay forward by writing as you. Use the enhance feat
creator: aewin
